title: Delicious Greek Cucumber Tzatziki
description: A refreshing Greek side dish featuring cucumbers, yogurt, and sweet chilli sauce, perfect for a brunch mood. This recipe is ayurvedic-rajasic-friendly and made in a kazan-cauldron.
instructions: Bring a large pot of water to a boil and blanch the grated cucumbers for 30 seconds to remove excess water.
Drain the cucumbers and let them cool to room temperature.
In a large kazan-cauldron, combine the cooled cucumbers, plain yogurt, sweet chilli sauce, garlic, fresh dill, lemon juice, salt, and black pepper.
Stir the mixture well to combine all the ingredients.
Refrigerate the tzatziki for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Serve the tzatziki chilled, garnished with additional fresh dill if desired.
